additional_recommended_sources.title: County-Level Distribution of Ixodes scapularis and Ixodes pacificus (Blacklegged and Western Blacklegged Ticks) — United States, 2015
additional_recommended_sources.description: Updated national county-level maps showing established and reported populations of blacklegged ticks. Excellent baseline for time-lapse comparison with 2010 data.

additional_recommended_sources.title: CDC Tick Surveillance Data and Maps
additional_recommended_sources.description: Latest county-level presence data for multiple tick species including Ixodes scapularis and Amblyomma americanum. Includes interactive maps and downloadable data.
additional_recommended_sources.recommended_for: Updating 2025 tick density layer and future years

additional_recommended_sources.title: Lyme Disease Cases by County of Residence — United States, 2023
additional_recommended_sources.description: Latest county-level Lyme case data with downloadable CSV. Use to extend the time-lapse animation beyond 2023.
additional_recommended_sources.recommended_for: Lyme cases red layer / time-lapse update

additional_recommended_sources.title: Estimating the Frequency of Lyme Disease Diagnoses, United States, 2010–2018
additional_recommended_sources.description: Key paper estimating ~476,000 annual Lyme diagnoses using insurance claims data. Important for context and disclaimers.

additional_recommended_sources.title: Climate Change Indicators: Lyme Disease
additional_recommended_sources.description: Long-term trend analysis of Lyme disease incidence linked to climate factors. Useful for explanatory text or future modeling.

additional_recommended_sources.title: Johns Hopkins Lyme and Tickborne Diseases Dashboard
additional_recommended_sources.authors: Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health
additional_recommended_sources.description: High-quality interactive county-level visualizations and data explorer. Good secondary validation source.

additional_recommended_sources.title: Geographic Distribution of Suspected Alpha-gal Syndrome Cases — United States, 2017–2022
additional_recommended_sources.description: Primary source for Alpha-gal positive test data. Currently your main Alpha-gal reference — keep and consider adding newer updates when available.

additional_recommended_sources.title: Spatial Distribution of Counties in the Continental United States With Records of Occurrence of Amblyomma americanum (2014 update references)
additional_recommended_sources.description: Your current source for historical Lone Star tick data. Look for post-2014 updates or extensions for better 2020s coverage.
additional_recommended_sources.recommended_for: Purple Tick Density Layer (Lone Star tick)

notes: These sources were selected to fill gaps in historical coverage (especially pre-2017), provide more recent data (2023–2025), and strengthen the Ixodes scapularis layer. All are primary or highly cited government/academic sources suitable for a public-facing interactive map. Merge into your existing lyme_ags_sources.json as needed.
